imageAlt: GoCardless - Success+ roadmap item preview image
title: GoCardless - Success+
summaryBody:
Success+ is a GoCardless option which will intelligently retry failed payments.
The project encompasses the work to allow GoCardless customers to use the Success+ on GoCardless payments initiated through FreeAgent.
